about.title: About us
about.text: Welcome to Škatula slatkog – a place where every bite tells a story. Our pastry shop was born from a love of traditional recipes and a desire to make every moment special. Each pastry is crafted with care, passion, and the finest ingredients. We look forward to making your special moments a little sweeter.
